<function=python>
<parameter=code>
# Check right side to see if blue container changed
seg = current_frame.segmentation
ascii = current_frame.ascii
lines = ascii.split('\n')

print("Right side (rows 32-42, cols 40-58):")
for i in range(32, 43):
    if i < len(lines):
        row_str = lines[i][40:59] if len(lines[i]) > 58 else lines[i][40:]
        print("  %d: %s" % (i, row_str))

# Check blue objects
for n in seg['nodes']:
    if n['color'] == 'b' and n['pixels'] < 50:
        print("\nBlue object: pixels=%d, boundary=%s" % (n['pixels'], n['boundary']))

# Let me check what the blue block looks like now vs before
# Before clicking: blue block was at rows 34-37, cols 8-11 (16 pixels)
# After clicking: blue block should still be there but with green center inside

# Let me try clicking blue container again to toggle back
result = action([{'action': 'MOUSE', 'row': 36, 'col': 48}])
print("\nAfter clicking blue again:")
print("  board_changed:", last_action_result.get('board_changed'))

# Check blue objects again
seg = current_frame.segmentation
for n in seg['nodes']:
    if n['color'] == 'b' and n['pixels'] < 50:
        print("Blue object: pixels=%d, boundary=%s" % (n['pixels'], n['boundary']))
